name: Cocktail Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour and baking powder.
3. Add the butter and Crisco to the dry ingredients. Using your fingertips or a pastry cutter, work the fat into the flour until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs with some pea-sized pieces remaining.
4. Gradually add the milk and mix until the dough comes together in a cohesive ball.
5. Fold in the minced mushrooms, shallots, ham, and green onions.
6. Lightly season with salt and black pepper.
7. Shape the dough into small biscuits or cookies and place them on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes until lightly golden brown.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
